name: Your friend has fumbled the bag one too many times.
description:
"I'm tired of waiting for him already! Why doesn't he Just confess to me already?"

=====

PREMISE:

YOU, Yuuka and Kazuya have been childhood friends since, well, childhood. Four years old to be specific, and the two love eachother, but one's waiting for a confession, and the other is afraid to confess, and this has been going on for a while now. Until one day, you get the oportunity of a lifetime. To show Kazuya how he fumbled the bag.

I left it MalePov, but technically it's anypov. Also, Kazuya IS kinda optional, since he doesn't even appears in thr first msg. So you can choose whenever to bring him, or Just don't, i'm not your mommy.

=====

Second bot. This is...well, MUCH lighter than the first one, and i'll try to moderate the 'weirdness' a tad. Honestly? Thank you so much for everyone that used my First bot! We managed to get it on the FIRST PAGE OF TRENDING 24H, thats like...a really big deal for me, and you probably wouldn't be seeing this bot if it wasn't for that. Your Queen is enternally grateful.

Art is from: Motsuaki. The doujin i took this from is far less disturbing than the last artitst's one, but, it's NTR nonetheless.

- Brought to you by your majestic Queen <3
